text.title: growth-gtm-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-gtm-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: ICP defined as "SMBs, startups, and enterprises across all industries".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This is not an ICP — it is a market. An ICP must be specific enough that you can name 50 companies or people who fit it. If you cannot name them, the ICP is too broad to guide channel or messaging decisions.

failure-mode.description: Competitive analysis that sources all claims from a single review platform (G2 or Capterra).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: G2 reviews are gamed; companies encourage positive reviews and dispute negative ones. SimilarWeb traffic is noisy at under 100K MAU. Triangulate across at least 3 independent sources: review platforms, Crunchbase/LinkedIn funding data, and direct user interviews.
